name: Xevious
description: Namco vertical shooter series centered on the Solvalou, air-to-ground combat, and the conflict against the Xevious forces.

eras.title: Arcade Shooter Era
eras.description: Xevious establishes Namco's influential vertically scrolling shooter format, followed by harder and remixed variants.

eras.title: Console and 3D Revival Era
eras.description: The series continues through Famicom follow-ups and later 3D reinterpretations.
